creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #4)
Maybe upstream stopped doing so. So I'd suggest contact upstream.

A devel-port lagging behind the release version is no more a devel and is for no use. As tor is a security related port I suggest remove the devel-version from the ports as this for sure not that what people expect when choosing this.
